mapper.sql: id, code, `name`, company_code, company_name, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, `type`, `status`, remark, tenant_id, create_user_id, create_time, update_user_id, update_time, is_delete
mapper.insert: insert into pl_bom_case (code, `name`, company_code, company_name, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, `type`, `status`, remark, tenant_id, create_user_id, create_time, update_user_id, update_time, is_delete) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{tenantId}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updatorId}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})

insert into pl_bom_case
code, `name`, company_code, company_name, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, `type`, `status`, remark, tenant_id, create_user_id, create_time, update_user_id, update_time, is_delete,
#{code}, #{name}, #{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{tenantId}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updatorId}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted},
mapper.update: update pl_bom_case set code = #{code}, `name` = #{name}, company_code = #{companyCode}, company_name = #{companyName}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName}, `type` = #{type}, `status` = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, create_user_id = #{creatorId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_user_id = #{updatorId}, update_time = #{updateTime}, is_delete = #{deleted} where id = #{id}
